title: Credit and Accounts Receivable
description:
What do we expect from you?

The Credit and Accounts Receivable Specialist is responsible for overseeing hotel credit operations, ensuring timely collection of receivables, managing credit risk, and maintaining accurate accounts receivable records. This role supports cash flow, enforces credit policies, and works closely with operational departments to ensure compliance and efficiency.

Key Responsibilities

Credit & Accounts Receivable Management

  • Review, approve, and manage credit applications for corporate, travel agent, and group accounts
  • Monitor guest and company credit limits; ensure adherence to approved terms
  • Oversee billing accuracy, invoicing, and timely collection of outstanding balances
  • Follow up on overdue accounts and initiate collection actions where necessary

Financial Control & Reporting

  • Prepare and analyze AR aging reports and credit exposure reports
  • Highlight high-risk accounts and recommend corrective actions
  • Assist with month-end closing, reconciliations, and audit requirements
  • Ensure compliance with internal controls, company policies, and SOPs

Operational Collaboration

  • Work closely with Front Office, Sales, Reservations, and Events teams to manage credit arrangements
  • Support smooth guest check-out processes related to billing and credit matters
  • Provide guidance to operational teams on credit procedures and best practices
  • Review and confirm all city ledger posting
  • Post, reconcile and allocate all payment received
  • Deposit tracking for Events
  • Monitor, follow up and report on daily basis on all Open folio, PM, PF accounts
  • Handle all manual billing

Leadership & Administration

  • Supervise and coach Accounts Receivable staff (if applicable)
  • Support the Director of Finance in daily operations and projects
  • Act as Finance Duty coverage when required
  • As and when any Ad Hoc work required

Requirements & Qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
  • Minimum 3–5 years’ experience in hotel accounts receivable and/or credit management
  • Strong understanding of hotel PMS and merchant payment portal and solutions
  • Excellent analytical, communication, and negotiation skills
  • High level of integrity, attention to detail, and professionalism

Key Competencies

  • Accounts Receivable daily management
  • Credit risk assessment
  • Financial accuracy and control
  • Stakeholder management
  • Problem-solving and decision-making
  • Time management and follow-up discipline

How do I deliver this?

  • Tell it like it is- Authentic, honest, you mean it, sincere, true.
  • Have fun and make friends - fun, energetic, whimsical, upbeat, “wink", casual.
  • I've got your back- Accountable, responsible, makes up for own promises, knows how to take ownership, follows - thru, dependable.
  • Play to win - Original, cutting edge, new, "outside the box”; open to new possibilities, different.     
  • Right here, right now - Attentive, detail-oriented, always focused, always in the moment, precise, owns the guest.

postedCompany.description:
Mondrian is a way of travel. A luxury lifestyle hotel, a global destination for locals or travelers.  Mondrian is always at the heart of the most exciting cultural scenes in the world.


Mondrian Singapore Duxton is a luxury lifestyle hotel built in the heart of the city’s prominent Duxton Hill neighborhood featuring 302 guestrooms, a lower three-story building in a contemporary and luxury loft suite.  Historic architecture takes on the famous Singapore 'shophouse' building typology on a modern spin, with a terracotta roof, and colonial-style window shutters, at the rear, connected by a garden, will be the main tower containing a mix of guest rooms, a speakeasy bar, and rooftop pool. The location is flawless with a bevy of signature restaurants, stylish bars, and local street food vendors all within walking distance.x


Ennismore and Accor’s joint venture to create the world’s fastest-growing lifestyle and entertainment hospitality company, with a global collective of entrepreneurial and founder-built brands with creativity & purpose at their heart.

For more information visit

www.mondrianhotels.com

www.ennismore.com
